Video.summary: Sara is suing her ex-boyfriend for breach of contract after he let his female friend move in with him.
Video.title: Stripped Bare

Video.summary: A couple say they bought a trailer from their neighbor, but he never gave it to them; he says they called the police and made death threats against him, so he's counter-suing for harassment.
Video.title: Trailer Troubles

Video.summary: Paulita is suing her baby daddy for the value of a car, saying she left him because he's an abusive drunk.
Video.title: Paying Up for the Car

Video.summary: A sperm donor, suspicions of infidelity, and broken trust bring Shannon and Jasmine's rocky five-year romance to the courtroom.
Video.title: Bowman vs. Bennett

Video.summary: Ashley is suing her former friend Terra, for not returning her dog after caring for it while she was in rehab.
Video.title: Tearful Canine Custody Battle

Video.summary: Priscilla is suing her disabled mother for the money she borrowed to purchase her wheelchair.
Video.title: Biting the Hand that Feeds You

Image.alt: Biting the Hand that Feeds You
Biting the Hand that Feeds You
Biting the Hand that Feeds You

Video.summary: This car-crazy sister claims she was scammed by her big brother's bogus paint job, and wants her money back.
Video.title: The Big Bro Botch

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana responds to an overturned vehicle. An intoxicated driver is found sleeping behind the wheel of his vehicle.
Video.title: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Image.alt: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Video.summary: Deputy Adams eradicates an indoor and outdoor marijuana grow.
Video.title: But I have a Prescription!

Video.summary: Joshua demands the return of an engagement ring after Eldrick ends their relationship in a viral livestream.
Video.title: Burroughs vs. Steele

Video.summary: A scandalous secret and a polygraph test alter the course of Ceia and Luis' relationship.
Video.title: Stewart vs. Abrew

Video.summary: An entertainer seeks help from the judges on how to deal with his girlfriend’s insecurity surrounding his line of work.
Video.title: Obiowo vs. Vranas

Video.summary: Sarah brings ex-boyfriend Richard to court for unpaid rent; he says she had an affair with the maintenance man.
Video.title: Frye vs. Hughes

Video.summary: Dawn confronts her boyfriend, Josh, about ongoing entanglements with his ex and various other women.
Video.title: Jones vs. Shaffer

Video.summary: Denise sues her ex, Darryl, claiming he tricked her into paying their son’s $200 DUI bail entirely, instead of splitting it. Darryl counters, saying she wired the money voluntarily and owes him $21,000 in back child support.
Video.title: You Are a Deadbeat Mom!

Video.summary: Desherica Smith claims her mother owes her for covering food and bills while she lived there and insists she doesn’t owe rent. Shocked her mom is suing, she feels the case is petty. Desherica believes they’re even and expects to win.
Video.title: Mother/Daughter Courtroom Drama

Video.summary: Llewellyn Clark sues ex-girlfriend Tyronica Munn for $1,400, claiming she stole it after a fight. Tyronica says she spent it on a hotel, champagne, and a massage, asserting the money was owed since Llewellyn freeloaded in her apartment.
Video.title: Ex Spending Spree

Video.summary: Anissa Williams sues her dad, Nathaniel Green, for $5,000, claiming he owes her money despite the heartbreak. Nathaniel argues the money was family kindness and countersues for $1,000 for slander.
Video.title: Abandoned by Her Father

Video.summary: Natheefa sues her brother Clifford, accusing him of stealing her 55" TV and owing $4,750 in rent after abruptly moving out. Clifford claims he left due to household tensions and took his own belongings.
Video.title: My Brother Stole My TV

Video.summary: Cate sues Ann Rosa for $1,140, claiming Ann sold her a defective pellet stove, misrepresenting it as functional. Ann argues the stove worked when sold, and any issues are Cate’s responsibility.
Video.title: Fireworks Over a Faulty Stove

Video.summary: Steven and Luz Spitzer hired photographer Frank Calabro for their wedding, but chaos ensued when a guest’s camera sparked a fight. Frank withheld the photos, citing a contract breach.
Video.title: Wedding Wrecker

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her nail tech Jonyell after paying her to take a nail class but she breached their contract.
Video.title: Getting Nailed for Class Tuition

Video.summary: A man says he dated the defendant for 20 years, and they have a child together, but now that he's married, the defendant has become extremely jealous of his new relationship; he sues for breach of contract, an electric bill and emotional distress.
Video.title: Love, Lies, and Legal Ties

Video.summary: After Vera's son was murdered in 2014, she learned that Alstin may be her grandson, and wants a DNA test.
Video.title: Seeking Her Grandson

Video.summary: Sherrita thinks her Aunt Crystal spends all her money on clothes so she's suing for car payments and repairs.
Video.title: Pay Up

Video.summary: Jada is suing her mother for $4,000 in unreturned property after kicking her out of the house.
Video.title: Smart Mouth and Bad Attitude

Video.summary: Judy is suing her niece for 12 months of unpaid rent. Cassandra says there was never a deal to pay any rent.
Video.title: Unconditional Rent

Video.summary: Were they loans? Was she funding her gambling boyfriend in order to rake in the profit?
Video.title: Going for Broke

Video.summary: While shopping for a website designer Brent met Joe but what a tangle website of woes did they weave.
Video.title: Website of Woes

Video.summary: Carol is suing her husband for using her money for a bachelor party. Marion argues it was a joint account.
Video.title: The Wedding Thief

Video.summary: Laura is suing her ex-friend and workmate for a loan. Caylee says Laura offered money without any obligations!
Video.title: The Devil's in the Details

Video.summary: Mark is suing his sister over his home's repair work. She claims that he is lying and exaggerating.
Video.title: A Riff in the Family

Video.summary: Christopher is suing his brother Ashlee for punches his tooth out over some spilled juice.
Video.title: My House My Couch

Video.summary: Friends Matt and James said everything was ok until their other roommate, David, turned into Goliath and became a violent religious fanatic, slinging shoes and punching faces.
Video.title: The Christian Crusader

Video.summary: Ronald and Rhonda let a kitchen renovation bring out the worst in eachother.
Video.title: Relationship Renovations

Video.summary: Johnny is suing his former friend for costs stemming from a botched dog-sitting deal.
Video.title: Sin and Tonic

Video.summary: Deputy Payne responds to a vehicle on fire with a teenager trapped inside.
Video.title: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Image.alt: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana arrests a central figure in a major ID theft ring.
Video.title: Mobile ID Theft Factory

Video.summary: Deputy Turnbull makes a visit to a known flop house.
Video.title: Dopers Come Together

Video.summary: An uncooperative felon tests the patience of the SED.
Video.title: Special Enforcement Detail Work

Video.summary: Deputy Campora arrests two men in possession of drugs and with felony warrants. Deputies Brady and Ford enforce a restraining order.
Video.title: What Bump in My Pants?

Video.summary: Deputy Payne shows us a typical day for the life of a deputy in El Dorado County.
Video.title: All in A Night's Patrol

Video.summary: A dangerous fugitive is wanted for assult and battery. A deputy stops and unregistrered vehicle. A look at the daily procedures deputies must follow before going on patrol.
Video.title: The Man in the Van

Video.summary: The SED act on a felony warrant. Deputy Miller breaks up an underage party in the woods.
Video.title: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Image.alt: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Video.summary: Deputy Carpenter investigates a marijuana grow and home theft. Deputy Bradley responds to an abusive alcoholic mother.
Video.title: Follow the Water

Video.summary: Deputies Payne and Miller apprehend a burglar under the influence at an animal hospital. The SED conducts a probation check on a known flop house.
Video.title: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Image.alt: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
